all.en: It started as a quiet Tuesday evening with nothing exciting to do.
all.zh: 那是一個平靜的週二晚上，沒什麼有趣的事可做。

all.en: Ya-wen opened her favorite shopping app just to browse through the new arrivals.
all.zh: 雅文打開最愛的購物應用程式，只是想瀏覽一下新上架的商品。

all.en: One blouse led to another, and soon her shopping cart was overflowing.
all.zh: 一件襯衫接著一件，很快她的購物車就滿出來了。

all.en: She told herself that everything was on sale, so it counted as saving money.
all.zh: 她告訴自己所有東西都在打折，所以算是省錢。

all.en: With a few quick taps, she placed an order worth nearly eight thousand dollars.
all.zh: 她快速點了幾下，下了將近八千元的訂單。

all.en: The next morning, the excitement of online shopping had completely disappeared.
all.zh: 隔天早上，網購的興奮感已經完全消失。

all.en: She realized she didn't actually need most of the items she had purchased.
all.zh: 她意識到自己其實不需要大部分買下的商品。

all.en: When the packages arrived, three of the dresses didn't fit her properly at all.
all.zh: 包裹送達時，有三件洋裝根本完全不合身。

all.en: The return process was complicated, and she had to pay the shipping fees herself.
all.zh: 退貨程序很複雜，而且她還得自己負擔運費。

all.en: She promised herself she would delete the app from her phone that very night.
all.zh: 她向自己保證當晚就要把那個應用程式從手機刪除。

all.en: Now she only shops online with a list and a strict spending limit.
all.zh: 現在她只在有清單和嚴格消費上限的情況下才會網購。

all.en: She wrote a long entry in her journal about the lessons she had learned.
all.zh: 她在日記裡寫下了長長一段，關於她從中學到的教訓。

all.en: From then on, Ya-wen waited at least two days before placing any online order.
all.zh: 從那時起，雅文下任何網路訂單前，都會至少等上兩天。

all.en: The two-day rule saved her from many unnecessary purchases in the following months.
all.zh: 接下來的幾個月裡，這個兩天規則讓她避開了許多不必要的消費。

all.en: She also unsubscribed from every promotional email that filled her crowded inbox.
all.zh: 她也取消了所有塞滿她信箱的促銷郵件訂閱。

all.en: Her best friend asked her to share these new shopping rules in detail.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友請她把這些新的購物規則詳細分享出來。

all.en: Together, the two of them started a small group chat for mindful spending tips.
all.zh: 她們兩人一起建了一個小型群組聊天室，分享理性消費的小撇步。

all.en: Ya-wen donated the dresses that did not fit to a local charity shop.
all.zh: 雅文把那些不合身的洋裝捐給了當地的慈善二手店。

all.en: The volunteers thanked her warmly and gave her a handwritten receipt for taxes.
all.zh: 志工們熱情地謝謝她，並給了她一張手寫的扣稅收據。

all.en: Her bank balance slowly recovered over the next three careful and quiet months.
all.zh: 接下來謹慎而平靜的三個月裡，她的銀行餘額慢慢恢復了。

all.en: She finally felt in control of her money, instead of letting it control her.
all.zh: 她終於覺得自己掌控了金錢，而不是讓金錢掌控自己。

all.en: She wrote a long honest journal entry about how shopping had once hidden her loneliness.
all.zh: 她寫下一篇長長的真誠日記，談購物如何曾經掩蓋她的孤單。

all.en: Reading those words helped her understand the deeper reasons behind her old buying habits.
all.zh: 重讀那些文字，幫助她理解過去購買習慣背後更深層的原因。

all.en: She started taking long evening walks instead of browsing online stores after dinner.
all.zh: 她開始在晚餐後散長長的步，而不是上網逛各種網路商店。

all.en: The fresh air calmed her mind and removed the urge to shop out of boredom.
all.zh: 新鮮的空氣讓她心情平靜，也消除了因無聊而想購物的衝動。

all.en: She joined a free online course about minimalism and simple intentional living.
all.zh: 她報名了一門關於極簡主義和簡單有意識生活的免費線上課程。

all.en: Each lesson encouraged her to appreciate what she already owned with genuine gratitude.
all.zh: 每一堂課都鼓勵她以真誠的感激，珍惜自己已經擁有的事物。

all.en: Her small apartment slowly transformed into a tidy, peaceful space full of light.
all.zh: 她的小公寓逐漸變成一個整潔、平靜又充滿光線的空間。

all.en: Friends commented that she seemed lighter and far more present during their conversations.
all.zh: 朋友們說她整個人變得輕盈許多，談話時也比過去更專注。

all.en: Last weekend, she helped a younger coworker organize her closet using the same method.
all.zh: 上週末，她用同樣的方法，幫一位年輕同事整理了衣櫃。

all.en: Her regret had transformed into a quiet wisdom she now happily shared with others.
all.zh: 她的後悔已轉化為一份平靜的智慧，如今她樂於與他人分享。
